mapper.sql: id, register_id, patient_id, patient_name, category_id, category_name, item_id, item_name, item_code, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, status, pay_time, refund_time, operator_id, operator_name, remark, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status = 0
AND id IN
#{expenseId}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status != 2 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND item_code = 'MEDICATION_FEE' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE expense_record SET status = #{status}, pay_time = #{payTime}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE expense_record SET status = #{status}, pay_time = #{payTime}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE expense_record SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE expense_record SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
